# Submission Templates (drafts)

These are **draft** GitHub Issue Forms for community deck and event submissions.

They are not used by this app directly. Copy them into the public data
repository so contributors get guided forms under **New Issue → choose a template**:

```
premodernhq/data-mirror/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/deck-submission.yml
premodernhq/data-mirror/.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/event-submission.yml
```

Once copied, the "Submit a Deck" / "Submit an Event" buttons on `/contribute`
(which deep-link to `.../issues/new/choose`) will land on these forms.

Design goals: minimal required fields, non-technical wording, paste-a-link
simplicity. A Discord lane (DM `externality_0502`) is offered in each form for
contributors who don't use GitHub.
